Name: SLIDE_FLOOR_PARAM
Description: Defines movement physics for slippery floor surfaces, including acceleration, deceleration, and speed thresholds.

Fields.Name: Maximum Speed (m/s)
Fields.Description: Maximum movement speed while on this surface.

Fields.Name: Initial Speed (m/s)
Fields.Description: Starting speed when entering or beginning movement on the surface.

Fields.Name: Acceleration (m/s²)
Fields.Description: Rate of speed increase while moving on the surface.

Fields.Name: Deceleration (m/s²)
Fields.Description: Rate at which speed decreases when not accelerating on the surface.

Fields.Name: Slip Threshold Speed (m/s)
Fields.Description: Minimum speed required for the character to be considered sliding.
